content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

July 2, 2002


Linda Howard, Treasurer
Green Party of El Dorado County
Post Office Box 1964
Placerville, CA 95667

Re:      Your Request for Advice
         Our File No. W-02-133

Dear Ms. Howard:

     As indicated in my telephone conversation with Michael Bernstein, who responded to my call on your behalf, questions regarding forms 410/450 may be directed to our Technical Assistance Division at 1-866-ASK-FPPC. Accordingly, we are withdrawing your request for advice.

     Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[signature]

Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

LTW:jg

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission (FPPC) to Linda Howard, Treasurer of the Green Party of El Dorado County. The FPPC informs Ms. Howard that her request for advice regarding forms 410/450 has been withdrawn because questions can be directed to their Technical Assistance Division at 1-866-ASK-FPPC. The letter also states that Ms. Howard should contact the FPPC at (916) 322-5660 if she has any additional questions. The letter is signed by Luisa Menchaca, General Counsel, and Lawrence T. Woodlock, Senior Counsel, Legal Division.
